notable_contests: 2014: Modi vs Kejriwal vs Mukhtar Ansari
text: Constituency: Varanasi, UP (Lok Sabha). Current MP: Narendra Modi (BJP, since 2014). 2024: Modi 6.12 lakh votes. 2014: Modi vs Arvind Kejriwal — historic contest. Sacred city. 19.32 lakh voters. Reserved: General.

notable_contests: Gandhi family bastion, Smriti Irani won 2019
text: Constituency: Amethi, UP (Lok Sabha). Current MP: Kishori Lal Sharma (INC, 2024). 2019: Smriti Irani (BJP) defeated Rahul Gandhi in historic upset. Gandhi family held Amethi since 1980s. Most watched constituency nationally.

Constituency: Rae Bareli, UP (Lok Sabha). Current MP: Rahul Gandhi (INC, 2024 — switched from Wayanad). Sonia Gandhi's seat 2004-2024. Indira Gandhi also contested from here. INC bastion. 18.63 lakh voters.
Constituency: Lucknow, UP (Lok Sabha). Current MP: Rajnath Singh (BJP, since 2014). Previously held by PM Vajpayee (1991-2009). BJP stronghold. State capital constituency. 22.8 lakh voters.

Constituency: Gandhinagar, Gujarat (Lok Sabha). Current MP: Amit Shah (BJP, since 2019). Previously held by L.K. Advani (1998-2019). Gujarat's capital. BJP bastion. 18.7 lakh voters. High-profile urban constituency.

Constituency: Indore, MP (Lok Sabha). 2024: BJP candidate won unopposed — all opposition candidates withdrew. Unprecedented in modern Indian elections. Cleanest city connection doesn't hurt BJP's appeal. 23 lakh voters.
